text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
That's the gist of it. So will you be coming to my
birthday party, Brian? ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't have to go. Is there any reason why I
should?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
A reason? Well... can't you come just because
someone special wants you to?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
I'm your rival. That makes me a special person,
pretty much the same as a friend. ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Still, I don't want to go. I'm not interested in
sweet stuff like cake.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Oh, didn't I mention? We're all going to an
all-you-can-eat barbecue for my birthday.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
It's this place I've been going to for all sorts of
celebrations since my days in the Victory Club. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
And they have a good price even though their
charcoal grills are the real deal! And when you
taste their specially made sauce...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you want to go now, right? Hehe. ♪ I'll teach
you the best way to grill too!
